events.text: Goal!  Portugal 1, Spain 0. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Sergio Busquets (Spain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Portugal 1, Spain 1. Diego Costa (Spain) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Video Review: Goal. Referee decision on field stands.
Bruno Fernandes (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Portugal 2, Spain 1. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Gonçalo Guedes.

Goal!  Portugal 2, Spain 2. Diego Costa (Spain) right footed shot from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Sergio Busquets with a headed pass   following a set piece situation.
Goal!  Portugal 2, Spain 3. Nacho (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Portugal 3, Spain 3. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the top right corner.
